subcodes.first_line: When the horizon of the Divine Manifestation shone forth and the birds burst into song, agitation seized the dwellers of earth save whom He caused to be at rest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا انار افق الظهور و غنت الطیور اذا اخذ الاضطراب سکان الارض الا من اسکنه
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
